title: Motions and Smooth
description: This project adds better player and mobs animations and other stuff giving to the game a better look.
body:
# Motions and Smooth!
This is a modpack dedicated to mods and texture packs that makes the game more alive and make it feel as fresh and smooth as possible, without ruining the Vanilla feeling of Minecraft.
## What is it inspired by?
The main inspiration behind this project was an add-on, Actions & Stuff wich is only for Bedrock Edition, so i decided to make this for all of you Guyss ❤️
### Perfomances:
_At the moment the mod pack is available for 1.21.8 and 1.21.11 fabric; in light of the amount of mods here, the performance is smooth, but require a capable computer_
### Thankss to Everyone!
Thanks to everyone for the support! I hope you will enjoy the modpack!
PS: I am a small developer who just started doing modpacks, so if you found bugs or else pls contact me ❤️
**:)Thank you SemSem for the help:)**
